---
name: Maintenance task
about: Track docs, refactor, perf, test, or chore work using the shardline issue format
title: "<type>(scope): <task> — <benefit>"
labels: maintenance
assignees: ""
---

Use one of these issue types in the title: `docs`, `refactor`, `test`, `chore`, `perf`.

## Description

Clear explanation of the maintenance task and why it matters.

## Current gap

- What is unclear, wasteful, brittle, or missing today

## Proposed change

- What should be cleaned up, tightened, or documented

## Scope and impact

- Affected crates or modules:
- Operator or developer workflow impact:
- Performance or security impact:

## Validation plan

- Checks to run:
- Tests or benchmarks to add or update:
- Documentation to update:

## Related issues and documentation

- Related:
- Relevant docs:
- Additional context:
